prompt: Create a hyper-realistic studio portrait of a fair, beautiful, slightly curvy young Pakistani woman shown from mid-torso upward, standing in a relaxed three-quarter pose facing slightly left of camera. She has long, thick, glossy black hair with a center part, soft loose waves falling over both shoulders, and smooth fair-to-warm skin tone. Her face is intentionally anonymized by a large centered vertical rectangular blur/mosaic block in natural skin-brown tones covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin while leaving the hairline, ears, neck, and body visible. She wears a fitted sleeveless bright red crew-neck dress with clean minimal styling, emphasizing a polished modern fashion portrait look. Use a plain light gray-white studio background, soft even diffused lighting, realistic skin texture on the neck and arms, sharp fabric detail, natural shadows, and a professional editorial photography finish. Keep the composition vertical, waist-up, with the subject centered slightly to the right, no jewelry, no visible text, no props, and no extra people.
